name: Gaia Prominence, the Fierce Force
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>熾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガイアプロミネンス
desc:
"Gaia Blaze, the Force of the Sun" + 1 face-up monster you control
When your opponent activates a monster effect in their hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 monster; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. When this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can target 1 FIRE monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Gaia Prominence, the Fierce Force" once per turn.

mentions: Gaia Blaze, the Force of the Sun
action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Synchro Monsters as Fusion Materials
